question: Which segment does the largest colored area correspond to in the final year shown?

options.A: The purple area (Segment D) indicates the highest share in the final year.
options.B: Cannot determine which segment the largest area represents without a legend to explain the color coding.
options.C: The green area (Segment B) shows the largest share in the final year.
options.D: The orange area (Segment C) represents the dominant share in the final year.

explanation: The chart shows different colored areas but provides no legend to identify which color corresponds to which category. Without a legend it is impossible to determine which specific category holds the largest share; options that assign a category to a color are guessing.
